    LoggerConfig

  • Classes in software.amazon.lambda.durable.logging used by software.amazon.lambda.durable.context
    Class
    Description
    DurableLogger
    Logger wrapper that adds durable execution context to log entries via MDC and optionally suppresses logs during replay.
